Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal: The user wants me to create a Python script using pm4pys POWL classes to model a specific complex workflow scenario. The scenario involves sequential steps, parallel tasks, a loop, an exclusive choice, and another set of parallel tasks followed by a final step.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Scenario Step-by-Step: Step 1: Verify Service Request (SR) -> Contract Setup (CS). Sequential. Step 2: After CS, two tasks run in parallel: Datacenter Allocation (DA) and Access Control Initialization (ACI). Step 3: After DA and ACI, looped configuration: BNC then optional DR, repeats. Step 4: Exclusive choice CD or MD. Step 5: QA and SA concurrent. Step 6: GLA after both.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Map to POWL Structure: Break into phases: phase1: SR->CS PO, phase2: DA||ACI PO no edges, loop_phase: LOOP(BNC,DR), choice: XOR(CD,MD), phase5: QA||SA PO no edges, GLA. Top-level PO: phase1 -> phase2 -> loop -> choice -> phase5 -> GLA.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Define nodes as Transitions: SR=Transition(SR), CS=Transition(CS), etc. Construct phase1=StrictPartialOrder(nodes=[SR,CS]); phase1.order.add_edge(SR,CS). Similarly for others.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify matches scenario: SR->CS in phase1, after CS DA||ACI in phase2, after both loop, after loop choice, after choice QA||SA, after both GLA. Correct.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Double-check loop: *(A,B) executes A then exit or B then A again. Matches BNC then optional DR repeat. XOR matches choice.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Partial order no edges means concurrent: correct for DA/ACI and QA/SA. Nesting StrictPartialOrder allowed as POWL models include POs.

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Consider flattening all into one PO with edges like CS->DA, CS->ACI, DA->loop, ACI->loop etc. Valid alternative but nesting cleaner.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self-Correction: Nesting valid per prompt, stick with modular phases.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Assemble code with comments mapping to steps, imports exact, no silent needed.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final verification: Syntax matches prompt example, operators LOOP/XOR correct, structure faithful.
